title: Instrument registry + ATM strike helpers
acceptance_criteria: src/ingestion/brokers/instrument-registry.ts exports getAtmStrike(underlying: 'NIFTY' | 'BANKNIFTY' | 'SENSEX', spot: number): number — rounds to nearest 50pt for NIFTY, 100pt for BANKNIFTY and SENSEX

Exports buildFyersSymbol({ underlying, expiry, strike, optionType }: { underlying: string, expiry: Date, strike: number, optionType: 'CE' | 'PE' }): string — produces Fyers format NSE:NIFTY{YY}{M}{DD}{STRIKE}{TYPE} where month codes are: Jan=1, Feb=2, ... Sep=9, Oct=O, Nov=N, Dec=D

Exports buildAngelOneToken(underlying: string, expiry: Date, strike: number, optionType: 'CE' | 'PE'): string — produces the Angel One instrument token format (document the format used at implementation time; if Angel One uses numeric tokens rather than string symbols, document the mapping approach)

Exports getCurrentWeeklyExpiry(underlying: 'NIFTY' | 'BANKNIFTY' | 'SENSEX', referenceDate?: Date): Date — returns the nearest upcoming Thursday (NIFTY/BANKNIFTY weekly expiry day); for SENSEX returns the nearest upcoming Friday. If referenceDate is on expiry day, returns that day.
Exports getVixSymbol(): string — returns 'NSE:INDIAVIX-INDEX' for Fyers
All edge cases handled: last-week-of-month symbols (Oct/Nov/Dec letter codes), strike number formatting (no decimal, e.g. 23000 not 23000.0)
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
